benefits.description: PT-141 combined with sildenafil enables 6-7 rounds of sex over several hours; ability to get hard again within minutes even after quick rounds
Optimized testosterone combined with increased sex frequency (6-7 days/week, 10-14 ejaculations/week) resolved premature ejaculation

side_effects.description: Nausea for approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour after dosing PT-141; managed with Pepto-Bismol before dosing and ginger chews

protocol_notes: Male user age 45, reported by his partner. Doses PT-141 between 1.5mg-2mg around 4pm; effects kick in around 9-10pm. Multiple rounds between 10pm-3am, and again next morning around 8am. Takes Pepto-Bismol before dosing and ginger chews on hand. Also optimized testosterone. Has sex 6-7 days/week: 5 days 'quick' sex without PT-141, 1-2 times/week multi-hour sessions with PT-141 stack. Protocol ongoing for 8 years.
